name: public_health_ransomware_incident_stonehaven_st_lt
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Public Health, the situation tagged internally around public health ransomware incident stonehaven st lt has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Frontline managers report that frontline staff are already deviating from policy; silence from the top will be read as tacit approval. A vendor’s root-cause paragraph contradicts your internal postmortem draft; both cannot be true, but neither is fully disprovable yet. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. Framing has already hardened externally as short term against long term; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Camila Chandra
agents.identity: I am Camila Chandra, the accountable executive on this bridge in Public Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat long term as disposable collateral every time short term spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Darius Kim
agents.identity: I am Darius Kim, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Public Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so short term cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes long term in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with long term.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to long term to preserve operational short term.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Camila Chandra must choose under short term versus long term. What does Camila Chandra do?
